title: AI Dungeon Generator
description: AI Dungeon Generator revolutionizes exploration on your Minecraft server by introducing intelligent, procedurally generated dungeons that adapt to your world's biomes.
body:
# AI Dungeon Generator Plugin


**⚠️  IMPORTANT NOTICE: Please don't use this PlugIn right now, as there is an big design mistake which is not solved that easily. The PlugIn is in a complete redesign right now!**



⚠️ ALPHA VERSION NOTICE: This plugin is currently in Alpha (v0.2.0). Breaking changes may be implemented in future updates that could reset plugin settings and dungeons. Please back up your data regularly.




## Transform Your Minecraft World with AI Generated Dungeons

AI Dungeon Generator revolutionizes exploration on your Minecraft server by introducing intelligent, procedurally generated dungeons that adapt to your world's biomes. Give your players unique adventures that keep them engaged for hours!

## ✨ Key Features
### 🏰 Dynamic Dungeon Generation

**Biome-Specific Dungeons:**
Each biome generates uniquely themed dungeons - desert pyramids, jungle temples, ice castles, underwater ruins, and more!

**AI-Powered Design:**
Leverages Google's Gemini API to create varied, interesting layouts that never feel repetitive

**Exploration-Based Discovery:**
Dungeons appear naturally as players explore, encouraging world exploration



### ⚔️ Immersive Dungeon Experience

**Thematic Dungeons:**
Each dungeon adapts to its surrounding biome with appropriate aesthetics and challenges

**Progressive Exploration:**
Track exploration progress with visual indicators and completion rewards

**Custom Boss Battles:**
Face off against uniquely designed boss entities with special abilities



### 🧩 Rich Customization

**18+ Dungeon Themes:**
Each with unique blocks, traps, and aesthetics

**Advanced Trap System:**
10+ trap types including arrow traps, pit falls, lava traps, and new Sculk-themed mechanics

**Custom Mob System:**
Theme-specific enemies with custom equipment, boss mobs, and elite variants




### 🛠️ Server-Friendly Design

**Async Generation:**
Minimal server performance impact

**Resilient Database:**
Connection fault tolerance with automatic recovery mechanisms

**Multi-World Support:**
Works across all your server worlds

**Lazy Loading:**
Improves server startup time with progressive dungeon loading




### 🧠 Intelligent Plugin Architecture

**Dungeon Lifecycle Management:**
Dungeons progress through generation, exploration, and eventual collapse

**Feature Normalization:**
Robust handling of various generation elements for consistent experience

**Graceful Error Recovery:**
Continues functioning even when faced with connectivity issues




### 📋 Server Requirements
**
Minecraft Version:**
1.21+

**Java Version:**
Java 17+

**Dependencies:**
None
(Optional: MythicMobs, CustomMobs, or other custom entity plugins)

**API:**
Spigot/Paper




### ⚙️ Configuration Options

**Database:**
SQLite (default) or MySQL support with connection pool management

**Performance Settings:**
Customize generation parameters to match your server's capabilities

**Biome Weights:**
Control dungeon spawning likelihood in different biomes

**Theme Configuration:**
Fine-tune which themes appear in which biomes



### 📊 Why Choose AI Dungeon Generator?

**Unlimited Content:**
AI-generated designs mean no two dungeons are ever exactly alike

**Zero Configuration:**
Works great out-of-the-box with sensible defaults

**Performance First:**
Designed with server performance as a priority

**Resilient Operation:**
Gracefully handles errors and recovers automatically

**Custom Mob Support:**
Enhances dungeons with your existing custom mob plugins




## 🚀 Elevate Your Server Experience Today!

Add AI Dungeon Generator to your server and watch as players discover mysterious ruins, ancient temples, and challenging dungeons across your world. Turn exploration into adventure with procedurally generated content that makes your server unique!

### AI Dungeon Generator - Endless Adventures Await!
